visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Intro and Checkout: The video opens with a top-down view of a silver shopping cart overflowing with grocery items including packaged chicken, green broccoli, and boxes of eggs. A large, stylized text overlay in yellow and red dominates the center, announcing a "Costco" annual sale event. A person's hand enters the frame from the right, placing bags of frozen shrimp and plastic-wrapped meat packages onto a black rubber conveyor belt at a checkout counter. The lighting is the bright, uniform illumination typical of a large retail warehouse, and several shoppers are visible as blurred figures in the background. (2) Product and Appliance Showcase: A fast-paced montage showcases various products, including Japanese Wagyu beef in clear packaging with "BEEF JAPAN" labels, clear plastic containers of prepared wraps, and shelves of Gillette razors. The scene transitions to household appliances like an Electrolux dehumidifier and a tall silver Sharp refrigerator, both featuring prominent "Black Friday" promotional price tags. The camera uses tight close-ups to emphasize product details and branding against the bright studio-style lighting of the store interior. (3) Warehouse Interior and Pricing: A wide-angle shot reveals the massive Costco warehouse interior with high industrial ceilings and rows of bright lights. The camera then focuses on detailed "Black Friday" signage and price labels for luxury items like diamond necklaces, an LG vacuum cleaner, and an OLED television showing a scenic video of a boat. The perspective alternates between broad establishing shots of the warehouse aisles and extreme close-ups of the yellow and black price tags displaying significant discounts. (4) Household Goods and Conclusion: The footage continues with quick cuts of Puma underwear, Sealy mattresses, a gaming chair, and kitchenware such as a Swiss Diamond wok and a Dyson fan. The perspective briefly shifts to an outdoor view of a large, grey industrial-style Costco building under a bright, clear sky with scooters passing by on a road. The video concludes with a fast-motion point-of-view sequence moving quickly through warehouse aisles packed with tall stacks of boxed inventory, ending with a final call-to-action text overlay.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO. [Variety]: 年度最殺 好市多. [Slogan]: 黑色星期五攻略 便宜的秘密 記得追蹤我們. (2) [Subtitle]: 我幫大家整理了 去年黑色星期五 大概300樣特價商品. (3) [Subtitle]: 食物100樣 日常用品150樣 破千折扣50樣商品. (4) [Subtitle]: 今年要衝的人 一定要記住 這五大攻略. (5) [Subtitle]: 攻略 1 看到黑標 = 全年最低價. [Logo]: Black Friday. (6) [Subtitle]: 看到這個標籤 就是此商品 今天的最低價 就在這邊. (7) [Subtitle]: 攻略 2 國外限量好物一定搶. (8) [Subtitle]: 黑五是好市多 一年一次會從國外 引進熱銷商品. (9) [Subtitle]: 像是CK內褲 好自在液體衛生棉 這些平常超少特價. (10) [Subtitle]: 出現了一定要立刻拿. (11) [Subtitle]: 攻略 3 家電 & 廚具 大多破千折扣. (12) [Subtitle]: 想省大錢的人 必買家電 折扣最猛種類最多 真的都是下手的好時機. (13) [Subtitle]: 攻略 4 日常用品必囤. (14) [Subtitle]: 衛生紙 洗衣精 保健品 個人清潔用品. (15) [Subtitle]: 黑五價格 通通超漂亮 一次補滿最划算. (16) [Subtitle]: 攻略 5 每天都會有新的特價商品. (17) [Subtitle]: 黑五期間 每天都會悄悄上新品 手腳快的人才搶得到. (18) [Subtitle]: 最後提醒 黑五人潮真的超級多 一定要一大早衝現場. (19) [Subtitle]: 因為很多東西 一下子就被掃光. (20) [Variety]: 想補貨 想省錢 趁這七天去好市多 補好補滿 錯過又要等一年啦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Approximately 8 people in total; most are shoppers or employees blurred in the background; one hand is visible in the foreground at the checkout counter.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: No clear main character face is shown; a person's hand is visible during the checkout segment, and the rest of the video uses POV or product-focused shots.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of a large-scale warehouse retail environment with high metal shelving units, industrial high-bay lighting, and wide concrete-floored aisles. Products are stacked on wooden pallets, and promotional 'Black Friday' signage is visible throughout. One brief outdoor shot shows a large grey warehouse building and a public road.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male narrator begins speaking in a professional, enthusiastic tone. His speech rate is fast and well-articulated, conveying a sense of urgency and excitement. Simultaneously, an upbeat electronic pop background track starts, featuring a steady 128 BPM tempo with a driving kick drum and bright synthesizer leads. (2) The narration continues with consistent pitch variability as the speaker details specific shopping strategies for the Costco Black Friday event. The background music maintains its energy, with the low-end bass and percussive elements providing a rhythmic foundation. Minimal ambient noise from the warehouse environment, such as faint distant chatter and a slight rustle, is perceptible beneath the main audio layers. (3) The vocal delivery remains high-arousal and energetic as the narrator lists different product categories and concludes with a call to action. There are no significant sound effects or technical distortions observed. The music and speech are well-balanced, though the music is prominent. The phase ends with a final promotional call, followed by a brief musical tail as the track fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Strategy Tips 1-5 -> Store Visit Advice -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a comprehensive buying guide for the Costco Black Friday sale, highlighting specific discounted products and shopping strategies to maximize savings and efficiency.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides specific purchasing advice, highlights numerous brand-name products, and explicitly guides viewers to shop at a specific retailer (Costco) during a promotional window.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy, fast-paced commercial guide optimized for social media engagement through dense informational overlays and rapid visual montages.
